lessons.title: Creating Matrices
lessons.description: Learn how to create matrices using matrix(), dim(), and understand the byrow argument.

lessons.title: Matrix Dimensions and Properties
lessons.description: Explore nrow, ncol, dim, rownames, colnames, and attributes of matrices.

lessons.title: Accessing Matrix Elements
lessons.description: Indexing matrices with row/column indices, logical conditions, and names.

lessons.title: Matrix Operations
lessons.description: Arithmetic on matrices, transpose (t()), and matrix multiplication (%*%).

lessons.title: Arrays and Combining Matrices
lessons.description: Extend to multi-dimensional arrays, and combine matrices with cbind() and rbind().
